zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern於1337年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特時，他的父親Stephen II Duke of Bavaria24歲，母親Elisabeth de Sicile27歲。他於1364年10月13日與Thaddea Visconti在德國貝也英格爾斯塔特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年9月26日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯尼德爾賀費爾德享年76歲，埋葬在德國貝也英格爾斯塔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern于1337年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 藍書特时，他的父亲Stephen II Duke of Bavaria24岁，母亲Elisabeth de Sicile27岁。他于1364年10月13日与Thaddea Visconti在德国貝也英格爾斯塔特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年9月26日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯尼德爾賀費爾德享年76岁，埋葬在德国貝也英格爾斯塔特。

nameMeanings.name: Stephan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: “der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from the river of this name in central Europe, denoting someone who lived on its banks.
Slovenian: probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, derived from Middle High German hader ‘quarrel’.

variants.name: Eder
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation; the name of Cú Chulainn's beloved, a woman of many talents who was blessed with beauty, wisdom, and chastity. It was revived as a given name in the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern was born in 1337, in Landshut, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, was 24 and his mother, Elisabeth de Sicile, was 27. He married Thaddea Visconti on 13 October 1364, in Ingolstadt, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 September 1413, in Niederschönenfeld, Donau-Ries, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 76, and was buried in Ingolstadt, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern est né en 1337, à Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Sicile, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Thaddea Visconti le 13 octobre 1364, à Ingolstadt, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1413, à Niederschönenfeld, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Ingolstadt, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern 1337 in Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen II Duke of Bavaria 24 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Sicile 27. Er hat am 13. Oktober 1364 in Ingolstadt, Bayern, Deutschland Thaddea Visconti geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. September 1413 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Niederschönenfeld, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Ingolstadt, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern è nato il nel 1337 nel Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Sicile, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Thaddea Visconti il 13 ottobre 1364, nel Ingolstadt, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 settembre 1413, nel Niederschönenfeld, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Ingolstadt, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayernが1337年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ランドシュトで生まれた時，父Stephen II Duke of Bavariaは24歳，母Elisabeth de Sicileは27歳であった。1364年10月13日にドイツバイエルンインゴルスタトでThaddea Viscontiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年9月26日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ドナウ-リーズニーダースチoネンフエルドで76歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンインゴルスタトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern(이)가 1337년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 랜드슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen II Duke of Bavaria(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Sicile(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1364년 10월 13일 독일 베이른 잉스타드트에서 Thaddea Visconti(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 9월 26일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 도나-리스 니더슈o니펠드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 잉스타드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern nasceu em 1337, em Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Sicile, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Thaddea Visconti em 13 de outubro de 1364, em Ingolstadt, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1413, em Niederschönenfeld, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemanha, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Ingolstadt, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern родился в 1337 г. в местности ландкрис ландшут, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Stephen II Duke of Bavaria было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Sicile, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Thaddea Visconti 13 октября 1364 г. в местности инголстадт, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 сентября 1413 г. в местности ниедирщoненфелд, ландкрис донау-риесь, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности инголстадт, беиирн, Германия.

sm.1375–1413: mai le 1375 e o'o I le 1413

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern nació en 1337, en Landkreis Landshut, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Stephen II Duke of Bavaria, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Sicile, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Thaddea Visconti el 13 de octubre de 1364, en Ingolstadt, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1413, en Niederschönenfeld, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Ingolstadt, Bayern, Alemania.
